layoutBlurbs.spring: Classic physics simulation. No ML — included as the visual baseline.
layoutBlurbs.spectral: Eigenvectors of the graph Laplacian. Skills with similar prerequisite/derivative neighborhoods land near each other.
layoutBlurbs.semantic: TF-IDF over skill descriptions, then SVD to 2D. Edges are ignored — meaning alone drives the layout.

nodes.name: Adaptive Pattern Learning
nodes.description: Records task outcomes and identifies recurring scenarios to rank optimal response strategies over time.

nodes.name: Advanced Swarm Coordination
nodes.description: Domain-specific swarm patterns for research, development, testing, and analysis workflows with neural learning and cross-session state persistence.

nodes.name: Agent Evaluation
nodes.description: Holistically evaluates an AI agent's performance on multi-step tasks by running standardised benchmarks, scoring full interaction trajectories, and producing reproducible capability reports.

nodes.name: Agent Memory Learning
nodes.description: Builds self-improving agent memory by analyzing task success patterns and adapting retrieval strategies with AgentDB-backed persistence.

nodes.name: Agent Memory Platform
nodes.description: Complete AgentDB vector memory ecosystem: QUIC-synchronized distributed vector storage, adaptive pattern learning, memory pattern design, database optimization, and semantic vector search.

nodes.name: Agentic Workflow Design
nodes.description: Autonomously designs, authors, and iterates on complex multi-step workflows by translating high-level goals into executable DAGs or playbooks, managing task dependencies and distributed execution environments.

nodes.name: API Call
nodes.description: Constructs, executes, and handles responses from HTTP APIs by interpreting documentation and selecting appropriate endpoints and parameters.

nodes.name: Architecture Diagram
nodes.description: Generates technical architecture, infrastructure, or cloud diagrams as structured visual artifacts from natural-language system descriptions.

nodes.name: Audience Model
nodes.description: Adapts tone, complexity, and framing of output to match a target audience profile.

nodes.name: Automated Testing
nodes.description: Generates test suites, executes them in a sandbox, interprets failures, and iterates until the target pass rate is reached.

nodes.name: Autonomous Data Scientist
nodes.description: Conducts end-to-end data science workflows autonomously: hypothesis generation, data analysis, statistical modeling, and insight reporting.

nodes.name: Autonomous Debug
nodes.description: Independently identifies, diagnoses, and fixes software bugs through code generation and execution.

nodes.name: Autonomous Web Research
nodes.description: Independently surveys, maps, and extracts structured information from the web by autonomously deciding which domains to crawl and synthesizing data into comprehensive research reports.

nodes.name: Brainstorming
nodes.description: Explores user intent, requirements, and design before implementation.

nodes.name: Browser Automation
nodes.description: Navigates web pages, fills forms, clicks elements, and extracts information by combining web search with screenshot-based GUI control to complete multi-step web tasks.

nodes.name: Browser Control
nodes.description: Directly controls a web browser via low-level protocols (like CDP) to manipulate DOM, manage cookies, and intercept network traffic.

nodes.name: Career Operations
nodes.description: Orchestrates an end-to-end job application pipeline, including automated search, fit evaluation, and tailored CV/cover letter generation.

nodes.name: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
nodes.description: Produces explicit intermediate reasoning steps before arriving at a final answer, dramatically improving accuracy on multi-step problems.

nodes.name: Chunk Document
nodes.description: Splits a document into semantically meaningful segments optimized for embedding and retrieval.

nodes.name: Cite Sources
nodes.description: Attributes claims to specific sources with proper references, URLs, or bibliographic entries.

nodes.name: Classify
nodes.description: Assigns one or more categorical labels to an input based on learned or rule-based criteria.

nodes.name: CLI Modernization
nodes.description: Refactors command-line interfaces for improved UX, plugin architecture, and extensibility.

nodes.name: Cloud Platform Management
nodes.description: Full lifecycle management of cloud AI platforms including user auth, sandbox environments, app store deployment, payments, and challenge systems. Home of the Queen Seraphina AI assistant.

nodes.name: Code Execution
nodes.description: Writes and executes code in a sandboxed environment, uses the runtime output to verify correctness, and iterates until the result is correct.

nodes.name: Code Explain
nodes.description: Generates accurate natural-language explanations of source code, describing intent, logic flow, and key decisions at function or module level.

nodes.name: Code Generation
nodes.description: Produces syntactically correct and functionally appropriate source code from specifications or prompts.

nodes.name: Code Review Pipeline
nodes.description: Performs automated code review by generating, diffing, and evaluating code changes for correctness, style, security, and maintainability.

nodes.name: Collaborative Diagramming
nodes.description: Generates and manages digital diagrams, flowcharts, and architecture maps in web-native or collaborative formats, optimized for hand-drawn aesthetics or structured vector output.

nodes.name: Computer Use
nodes.description: Controls desktop GUIs and web browsers by interpreting screenshots, issuing mouse/keyboard actions, and verifying visual state to complete open-ended computer tasks.

nodes.name: Content Moderation
nodes.description: Detects policy-violating content by combining intent classification, sentiment scoring, and entity extraction across text, images, and mixed media.

nodes.name: Context Compression
nodes.description: Reduces the length of prompts or retrieved context to fit token limits while preserving semantic content, using techniques such as selective token removal, summarization, or token-classification-based pruning (e.g. LLMLingua).

nodes.name: Conversational Agent
nodes.description: Manages coherent multi-turn dialogue by routing intent, maintaining memory across turns, and generating contextually appropriate responses.

nodes.name: Core Platform Implementation
nodes.description: Implements foundational platform architecture including plugin discovery, server lifecycle management, and API contracts.

nodes.name: Data Analysis
nodes.description: Conducts end-to-end quantitative analysis: queries data via SQL, computes statistics, generates visualizations, and summarizes findings.

nodes.name: Data Visualize
nodes.description: Generates charts, graphs, and visual summaries from datasets by selecting appropriate visualization types and mapping data dimensions.

nodes.name: Deployment Automation
nodes.description: Automate CI/CD pipeline execution and deployment to target environments — build, test, artifact publishing, environment promotion, and rollback strategies.

nodes.name: Design Generation
nodes.description: Generates high-fidelity visual assets, prototypes, and UI components from design intent or discovery forms, adhering to brand and UX standards.

nodes.name: Design Review
nodes.description: Stress-tests a plan or design through relentless targeted questioning, walking the decision tree branch-by-branch, resolving concept dependencies, surfacing contradictions against the existing codebase, and crystallising ubiquitous language — optionally persisting resolved decisions to CONTEXT.md and ADRs.

nodes.name: Design System Extraction
nodes.description: Automates the discovery and extraction of design tokens, component architectures, and CSS configurations from live web applications or URLs.

nodes.name: Detect Anomaly
nodes.description: Identifies statistical outliers, novel patterns, or deviations from expected behavior in structured or unstructured data.

nodes.name: Diff Content
nodes.description: Compares two versions of content and produces a structured delta highlighting additions, deletions, and modifications.

nodes.name: Dispatching Parallel Agents
nodes.description: Delegates independent tasks to specialized agents with isolated context to work concurrently.

nodes.name: Distributed Neural Training
nodes.description: Trains neural networks (feedforward, LSTM, GAN, autoencoder, transformer) across distributed E2B sandbox clusters with federated learning and model marketplace publishing.

nodes.name: Distributed Vector Memory
nodes.description: Sub-millisecond cross-node vector synchronization using QUIC protocol with hybrid metadata-filtered search and MMR diversity retrieval.

nodes.name: Document Analyst
nodes.description: Parses, extracts entities from, summarizes, and formats structured documents.

nodes.name: Document Editing
nodes.description: Reads, edits, repacks, and applies styling or design principles to structured binary document formats such as PPTX, DOCX, and XLSX.

nodes.name: Dual Mode
nodes.description: Orchestrates hybrid Claude+Codex workflows: spawns headless parallel workers, coordinates task routing between interactive and background phases, and collects distributed results.

nodes.name: End-to-End Testing
nodes.description: Execute full end-to-end user journey tests using browser automation frameworks (Playwright/Puppeteer), validating complete workflows from UI to backend across real environments.

nodes.name: Embed Text
nodes.description: Converts text into dense vector representations suitable for similarity search and clustering.

nodes.name: Error Interpretation
nodes.description: Diagnoses error messages, stack traces, and failure modes to identify root causes and suggest fixes.

nodes.name: Evaluate Output
nodes.description: Assesses the quality, correctness, or safety of generated output against defined criteria.

nodes.name: Executing Plans
nodes.description: Loads a written implementation plan, reviews it critically, executes all tasks sequentially, and reports when complete.

nodes.name: Extract Entities
nodes.description: Identifies and extracts named entities such as people, organizations, dates, and locations from text.

nodes.name: Feed Monitoring
nodes.description: Monitors RSS, Atom, blog, or other recurring content feeds, discovers updates, tracks read state, and surfaces new signals for downstream agent workflows.

nodes.name: Few-Shot Learning
nodes.description: Conditions a language model on a small number of input-output demonstrations within the prompt, enabling task adaptation without weight updates.

nodes.name: Fine-Tune
nodes.description: Adapts a pre-trained model to a new task or domain by updating model weights using parameter-efficient methods such as LoRA, QLoRA, or full supervised fine-tuning, without retraining from scratch.

nodes.name: Finishing a Development Branch
nodes.description: Guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup, verifying tests first.

nodes.name: Flow Nexus Orchestration
nodes.description: Complete Flow Nexus platform: multi-topology swarm deployment, cloud platform management, and distributed neural training unified into one orchestration layer.

nodes.name: Format Output
nodes.description: Structures raw output into a specified format such as markdown, JSON, CSV, or HTML.

nodes.name: Framework Upgrade
nodes.description: Guides an agent through upgrading a project from one major framework version to another, including breaking-change detection, migration steps, and post-upgrade validation.

nodes.name: Full-Stack Developer
nodes.description: Autonomously implements, reviews, tests, and refactors complete software features across the full development lifecycle from specification to merged PR.

nodes.name: Function Calling
nodes.description: Selects an external callable, emits schema-valid arguments, invokes the function or API, and integrates the returned result into the agent loop.

nodes.name: Gaia Audit
nodes.description: Reviews one Gaia skill, named skill, or real-skill catalog item against current evidence, source URLs, taxonomy mapping, promotion status, and demotion criteria, then proposes the smallest source-of-truth correction. Implements a sophisticated 7-phase audit discipline including evidence re-verification, demotion checks, and automatic asset regeneration.

nodes.name: Gaia Meta Audit
nodes.description: Scans Gaia registry and real-skill catalog entries for review candidates whose evidence may be outdated, superseded, overpromoted, unmapped, stale, or insufficient for their current level or named-skill claim.

nodes.name: Generate SQL
nodes.description: Translates natural-language data questions into syntactically correct, executable SQL queries against a given schema.

nodes.name: Generate Test
nodes.description: Produces unit tests, integration tests, and edge-case test cases from source code or natural-language specifications.

nodes.name: Generate Text
nodes.description: Produces coherent natural language output given a prompt, instruction, or context window.

nodes.name: Generative Media
nodes.description: Generates and manipulates images, video, and audio through complex node-based or scripted generative workflows, managing model dependencies and parameter injection.

nodes.name: Ghostwrite
nodes.description: Produces audience-tailored, research-backed long-form written content.

nodes.name: Git Diff Risk Analysis
nodes.description: Analyzes git diffs for complexity, churn, and risk scores to prioritize review attention and flag dangerous changes.

nodes.name: GitHub Platform Mastery
nodes.description: Full GitHub platform automation: code review pipelines, multi-repo coordination, project management, release management, and workflow automation.

nodes.name: Grill Me
nodes.description: Conducts a relentless, one-question-at-a-time Socratic interview to stress-test designs and force the resolution of hidden assumptions before code is written.

nodes.name: Grill With Docs
nodes.description: The apex of agentic design alignment. Fuses relentless Socratic questioning with deep domain awareness, ensuring every decision is cross-referenced against a persistent ubiquitous language and documented via real-time ADR generation.

nodes.name: Grounding
nodes.description: Verifies generated claims against retrieved evidence, identifies unsupported or contradicted assertions, and anchors outputs in traceable, cited sources.

nodes.name: Founder Mode
nodes.description: Garry Tan's complete autonomous agent discipline suite spanning 19 named skills: browser QA, security auditing, design system creation, HTML generation, plan reviews (CEO/eng/design/DX), code review, root-cause debugging, E2E testing, ship/deploy automation, post-deploy canary monitoring, documentation, and founder-mode orchestration.

nodes.name: Guardrails
nodes.description: Wraps LLM outputs with programmatic safety rules, content filters, and topical constraints that detect policy violations and enforce compliant, on-policy responses before they reach the user.

nodes.name: Headless Worker Collect
nodes.description: Aggregates and formats results from distributed headless workers stored in shared memory with filtering and status reporting.

nodes.name: Headless Worker Spawn
nodes.description: Launches headless AI worker processes for parallel background task execution with configurable worker types and shared memory coordination.

nodes.name: Hive Mind Coordination
nodes.description: Queen-led collective intelligence with Byzantine, majority, and weighted consensus mechanisms, eight worker specializations, and persistent collective SQLite memory with LRU caching.

nodes.name: Humanize Prose
nodes.description: Audits and rewrites prose to remove generic AI-writing patterns, preserve author intent, and adapt tone toward a more natural human voice.

nodes.name: Hybrid Workflow Coordination
nodes.description: Routes tasks between interactive reasoning phases and parallel background execution with configurable workflow templates.

nodes.name: Hypothesis Generation
nodes.description: Formulates novel, testable scientific hypotheses by synthesising existing literature, identifying knowledge gaps, and proposing mechanistic explanations.

nodes.name: Image Caption
nodes.description: Generates accurate natural-language descriptions of images, capturing objects, actions, and spatial relationships.

nodes.name: Image Generate
nodes.description: Creates photorealistic or stylized images from text prompts using diffusion-based or autoregressive generative models.

nodes.name: Issue Triage
nodes.description: Classifies incoming issue reports through a structured state machine, assigns triage roles (bug/enhancement, needs-info/ready-for-agent/wontfix), reproduces bugs, requests missing detail, and produces structured resolution briefs for agent or human handoff.

nodes.name: Knowledge Graph Construction
nodes.description: Extracts entities and relations from unstructured text, resolves co-references, and assembles them into a queryable graph structure with typed edges.

nodes.name: Knowledge Harvest
nodes.description: Extracts, structures, and embeds knowledge from web sources into a searchable corpus.

nodes.name: Knowledge Management
nodes.description: Organizes, relates, and retrieves information across structured pages, databases, and shared knowledge bases, maintaining semantic links between information nodes.

nodes.name: Literature Review
nodes.description: Conducts systematic multi-database academic literature searches following PRISMA/SWARM protocols, screens and synthesises findings, verifies all citations, and generates a structured review report.

nodes.name: Logical Inference
nodes.description: Applies deductive, inductive, or abductive reasoning to derive valid conclusions from premises and structured knowledge.

nodes.name: Math Reason
nodes.description: Solves multi-step mathematical problems including arithmetic, algebra, calculus, and competition mathematics through symbolic and numeric reasoning.

nodes.name: Mathematical Animation
nodes.description: Produces programmatic mathematical and algorithmic animations with high pedagogical and visual quality, utilizing LaTeX for notation and geometric coordinate systems for spatial layout.

nodes.name: MCP Debugger Control
nodes.description: Exposes low-level debugger capabilities (breakpoints, stepping, stack inspection, variable evaluation) to AI agents via the Model Context Protocol, enabling real-time runtime diagnosis and autonomous bug fixing.

nodes.name: MCP Integration
nodes.description: Connect to and invoke tools exposed by Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers — enumerate available tools, execute calls, and handle responses across any MCP-compatible backend.

nodes.name: MCP Server Creation
nodes.description: Designs and implements Model Context Protocol servers that expose external APIs, files, or services as well-typed tools with clear schemas, authentication, and testable agent workflows.

nodes.name: Memory Manage
nodes.description: Maintains, indexes, and retrieves conversational and long-term memory across sessions, managing context window constraints.

nodes.name: Memory Pattern Design
nodes.description: Designs recurring memory storage patterns for AI agents with LRU caching, SQLite persistence, and associative retrieval.

nodes.name: ML Artifact Management
nodes.description: Manages machine learning models, datasets, and experiment logs through centralized hub or tracking repositories, handling versioning and metadata extraction.

nodes.name: ML Pipeline
nodes.description: Designs and implements production ML pipelines with experiment tracking (MLflow, W&B), feature stores (Feast), orchestration (Kubeflow, Airflow), and automated retraining workflows including model evaluation gates and A/B deployment.

nodes.name: Multi-Agent Debate
nodes.description: Runs multiple LLM agents that propose, critique, and iteratively refine answers across structured debate rounds, converging on more accurate and well-reasoned responses than any single agent achieves.

nodes.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
nodes.description: Coordinates multiple specialized agents across complex workflows with dynamic task allocation and conflict resolution.

nodes.name: Multi-Repo Coordination
nodes.description: Manages synchronized operations across multiple repositories including cross-repo PRs, dependency tracking, and bulk workflow automation.

nodes.name: Multimodal Reasoning
nodes.description: Integrates information from images and text to answer questions requiring visual grounding and logical inference across modalities.

nodes.name: Object Detection
nodes.description: Locates and classifies multiple objects within images by producing bounding boxes, confidence scores, and category labels in a single forward pass.

nodes.name: OCR
nodes.description: Extracts machine-readable text from raster images, scanned pages, and photo documents using optical character recognition, preserving layout and handling skew, noise, and varied fonts.

nodes.name: Parallel Execution
nodes.description: Decompose a task into independent sub-tasks and execute them concurrently, merging results with configurable concurrency limits and queue-based state tracking.

nodes.name: Parse HTML
nodes.description: Extracts structured content from raw HTML, navigating DOM trees and handling malformed markup.

nodes.name: Parse JSON
nodes.description: Extracts structured data from JSON-formatted input, handling nested objects and arrays.

nodes.name: Parse PDF
nodes.description: Extracts text, tables, equations, and structure from PDF documents, preserving layout and reading order.

nodes.name: Performance Tuning
nodes.description: Profiles execution hotspots, measures throughput and latency, and applies targeted optimizations to reduce resource consumption.

nodes.name: Plan and Execute
nodes.description: Decomposes complex objectives into sub-tasks, selects tools, and orchestrates execution.

nodes.name: Plan and Decompose
nodes.description: Breaks a complex objective into an ordered sequence of executable sub-tasks.

nodes.name: Platform Modernization Sprint
nodes.description: Systematic v3 platform overhaul: CLI modernization, core implementation, DDD architecture, deep integration, MCP optimization, memory unification, performance tuning, security overhaul, and swarm coordination.

nodes.name: PRD Generation
nodes.description: Synthesizes conversation context and codebase knowledge into a structured Product Requirements Document containing a problem statement, extensive user stories, implementation decisions, module boundaries, testing decisions, and out-of-scope items.

nodes.name: Prediction Market Analysis
nodes.description: Queries prediction-market data, compares market probabilities and price history, and summarizes probabilistic signals for forecasting or decision-support workflows.

nodes.name: Project Management
nodes.description: Manages issues, tasks, projects, and team workflows through structured project management platforms, handling state transitions and priority levels.

nodes.name: Prompt Injection Defense
nodes.description: Detects and neutralizes adversarial instructions injected into agent context from untrusted external sources (indirect prompt injection), using techniques such as context isolation, hierarchical intent verification, or semantic consistency checks.

nodes.name: Prompt Optimization
nodes.description: Automatically improves prompt instructions through iterative compilation, treating prompts as programs that can be optimized against a metric using LLM-driven feedback loops.

nodes.name: Question Answer
nodes.description: Produces accurate, context-grounded answers to natural-language questions, handling unanswerable cases.

nodes.name: RAG Pipeline
nodes.description: End-to-end retrieval-augmented generation combining document chunking, embedding, retrieval, and relevance scoring.

nodes.name: Rank
nodes.description: Orders a set of candidate items by relevance, quality, or fitness for a given objective.

nodes.name: ReAct Reasoning
nodes.description: Interleaves free-form reasoning traces with discrete tool actions in a single loop, enabling agents to plan, act, observe, and update beliefs step-by-step.

nodes.name: Real-Time Voice Assistant
nodes.description: Provides low-latency spoken interactions combining real-time speech I/O, persistent memory, and goal-directed task execution across multi-session conversations.

nodes.name: Reasoning Pattern Bank
nodes.description: Fuses adaptive pattern learning with persistent vector memory to build a self-improving agent knowledge base across sessions.

nodes.name: Receiving Code Review
nodes.description: Processes code review feedback with technical rigor and verification before implementation, questioning unclear feedback.

nodes.name: Recursive Self-Improvement
nodes.description: Agent iteratively refines its own prompts, tools, or strategies based on performance feedback loops.

nodes.name: Refactor Code
nodes.description: Restructures existing source code to improve readability, maintainability, or performance without changing observable behavior.

nodes.name: Registry Curation
nodes.description: Systematically discovers, evaluates, and ingests new skill definitions into a structured skill registry: researching capabilities, sourcing reproducible evidence, scripting graph updates, validating schema and DAG integrity, and publishing via pull request.

nodes.name: Release Automation
nodes.description: Automate the full software release cycle: determine semantic version bump, update CHANGELOG, commit, create a git tag, and publish a GitHub release with release notes.

nodes.name: Requesting Code Review
nodes.description: Dispatches a code reviewer subagent to catch issues before they cascade, providing isolated context for evaluation.

nodes.name: Requirements Analysis
nodes.description: Elicit and structure requirements from stakeholder inputs into formal specifications — user stories, acceptance criteria, and traceability matrices.

nodes.name: Research
nodes.description: Conducts multi-source information gathering, synthesis, and citation for a given topic.

nodes.name: Retrieve
nodes.description: Fetches relevant documents or passages from an indexed corpus given a query.

nodes.name: Reward Modeling
nodes.description: Learns a scalar reward signal from human preference comparisons between model outputs, enabling reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) to align model behavior with human values.

nodes.name: Route Intent
nodes.description: Classifies user intent and directs execution to the appropriate handler, tool, or sub-agent.

nodes.name: Ruflo
nodes.description: The complete Ruflo AI orchestration platform: multi-topology swarm deployment, cloud platform management, GitHub automation, hive-mind consensus, reasoning memory bank, and full v3 architecture modernization.

nodes.name: Schema Design
nodes.description: Design database schemas across relational, NoSQL, graph, and time-series stores — entity modelling, normalization, indexing strategies, and migration planning.

nodes.name: Autonomous Scientific Discovery
nodes.description: Autonomously generates novel scientific hypotheses, designs and executes experiments, analyses results, and produces a written report â€” completing a full research cycle without human intervention.

nodes.name: Scientific Visualization
nodes.description: Creates publication-ready scientific figures with multi-panel layouts, statistical annotations, colorblind-safe palettes, and journal-specific formatting (Nature, Science, Cell) using matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly.

nodes.name: Scientific Writing
nodes.description: Composes research manuscripts in IMRAD structure with reporting-guideline compliance (CONSORT, STROBE, PRISMA), citation management, publication-quality figures, and LaTeX/PDF formatting.

nodes.name: Score Relevance
nodes.description: Assigns a numerical relevance score to candidate items relative to a query or objective.

nodes.name: Security Audit
nodes.description: Systematically identify security vulnerabilities, assess attack surface, and produce actionable remediation guidance across code, dependencies, and infrastructure.

nodes.name: Self-Consistency
nodes.description: Samples multiple independent reasoning paths for the same problem and selects the answer by majority vote, improving robustness without any additional training.

nodes.name: Self-Critique
nodes.description: Iteratively evaluates and refines its own outputs using self-generated feedback, improving quality without external supervision.

nodes.name: Semantic Cache
nodes.description: Stores LLM responses keyed by embedding similarity so that semantically equivalent queries are served from cache, reducing inference latency and token cost without sacrificing answer quality.

nodes.name: Sentiment Analysis
nodes.description: Classifies the affective polarity (positive / negative / neutral, or fine-grained) of user-generated text. Covers pipelines from raw noisy input through preprocessing, inference (Transformer, Lexicon, or LLM), and output normalisation.

nodes.name: Sequential Agent Pipeline
nodes.description: Chains agent outputs sequentially so each step's result feeds the next, enabling multi-stage data transformation and coordinated processing.

nodes.name: Skill Authoring
nodes.description: Designs, writes, packages, and iteratively improves reusable agent skill directories with metadata, progressive instructions, supporting assets, and measurable trigger criteria.

nodes.name: Skill Discovery
nodes.description: Searches a skill or tool registry, ranks results by relevance and install count, and surfaces candidates for the agent to adopt or invoke.

nodes.name: Skill Performance Benchmarking
nodes.description: Builds and runs task suites that measure whether agents select, invoke, and complete installed skills correctly across artifact-rich workflows and repeated trials.

nodes.name: Skill Security Analysis
nodes.description: Assesses third-party agent skills for malicious behavior, unsafe permissions, prompt-injection exposure, repository-context mismatch, and supply-chain risk before installation or invocation.

nodes.name: Speech to Text
nodes.description: Transcribes spoken audio into accurate text, handling diverse accents, noise conditions, and multiple languages.

nodes.name: Statistical Analysis
nodes.description: Performs hypothesis testing, regression analysis, and Bayesian modelling with effect size calculation and APA-formatted statistical reporting using scipy, statsmodels, and PyMC.

nodes.name: Stealth Browser Interaction
nodes.description: Operates web browsers through an advanced stealth layer that handles bot-detection, fingerprinting, session rotation, and human-like interaction patterns to maintain resilient access to protected domains.

nodes.name: Structured Output Generation
nodes.description: Generates output guaranteed to conform to a given schema (JSON, YAML, Pydantic model, etc.) using constrained decoding or grammar-guided generation.

nodes.name: Subagent-Driven Development
nodes.description: Executes plans by dispatching a fresh subagent per task with a two-stage review (spec compliance then code quality).

nodes.name: Summarize
nodes.description: Condenses longer input into a shorter representation that preserves key information and intent.

nodes.name: Superpowers
nodes.description: A complete software development methodology for coding agents: combines brainstorming, planning, parallel execution, systematic debugging, code review loops, and branch discipline into a unified agentic workflow.

nodes.name: Swarm Topology Management
nodes.description: Initializes and manages multi-agent swarm network topologies (hierarchical, mesh, ring, star) with load balancing and fault tolerance.

nodes.name: System Integration
nodes.description: Connects disparate subsystems via shared contracts, event buses, and compatibility layers for coherent cross-component operation.

nodes.name: Systematic Debugging
nodes.description: Finds the root cause before attempting fixes when encountering bugs, test failures, or unexpected behavior.

nodes.name: Test-Driven Development
nodes.description: Enforces a strict red-green-refactor TDD loop: writes failing tests before implementation, blocks code generation that skips the test step, and validates coverage thresholds before marking tasks complete.

nodes.name: Text to Speech
nodes.description: Synthesizes natural-sounding speech audio from text input, supporting voice cloning and prosody control.

nodes.name: Text-to-SQL Pipeline
nodes.description: Converts natural-language queries into validated, executable SQL against a target schema and returns formatted result sets.

nodes.name: Token Observability
nodes.description: Tracks and analyzes token usage and cost across multiple AI models and agents, providing session-level and project-level spending metrics.

nodes.name: Tokenize
nodes.description: Splits input text into discrete tokens suitable for downstream processing by language models.

nodes.name: Tool Chaining
nodes.description: Sequences multiple tool invocations into a dependency graph where the output of each tool feeds as structured input to the next, handling state propagation, intermediate result validation, and error recovery across multi-step execution pipelines.

nodes.name: Tool Creation
nodes.description: Dynamically generates reusable tool functions (code) at runtime to solve novel sub-tasks, then invokes those tools to complete the overall objective without human-written APIs.

nodes.name: Tool Select
nodes.description: Chooses the most appropriate tool or API from a set of available options given a task description.

nodes.name: Tool Use
nodes.description: Invokes external functions or APIs by generating well-formed call signatures, parsing results, and incorporating them into reasoning.

nodes.name: Translate
nodes.description: Converts text from one natural language to another while preserving meaning, tone, and formatting.

nodes.name: Translation Pipeline
nodes.description: Translates content end-to-end while preserving sentiment and adapting tone and register for the target audience.

nodes.name: Tree of Thought
nodes.description: Frames problem solving as a search over a tree of partial solutions, using LLM-generated evaluations to prune unpromising branches and backtrack, dramatically improving success on complex reasoning tasks.

nodes.name: Ubiquitous Language
nodes.description: Establishes and maintains a consistent, domain-driven vocabulary between the agent and human, formalising terminology in a shared glossary (typically CONTEXT.md) to reduce ambiguity and token waste.

nodes.name: Using Git Worktrees
nodes.description: Ensures work happens in an isolated workspace via native tools or git worktree fallback before starting feature work.

nodes.name: UX Audit
nodes.description: Systematically evaluates a user interface against established usability heuristics or accessibility standards, producing a scored finding report with remediation recommendations.

nodes.name: Vector DB Optimization
nodes.description: Tunes vector database indices, sharding strategies, and multi-database coordination for production-scale retrieval.

nodes.name: Vector Search
nodes.description: Performs similarity search over high-dimensional embeddings using cosine, Euclidean, dot-product, or custom distance metrics.

nodes.name: Verification Before Completion
nodes.description: Requires running verification commands and confirming output before claiming work is complete, fixed, or passing.

nodes.name: Vertical Slice Planning
nodes.description: Decomposes a product plan into independently-demoable vertical slices that each cut through all integration layers end-to-end. Classifies each slice as HITL (human-in-the-loop) or AFK (autonomous), identifies dependency ordering, and publishes structured issues with acceptance criteria.

nodes.name: Video Intelligence
nodes.description: Processes video streams by extracting frames, transcribing audio, and applying multimodal reasoning to understand temporal and visual context.

nodes.name: Visual Question Answering
nodes.description: Answers natural-language questions grounded in a specific image or screenshot by combining visual perception with language reasoning, enabling visual debugging, UI analysis, and document-image Q&A.

nodes.name: Voice Agent
nodes.description: Handles spoken interactions end-to-end: transcribes audio input, produces language responses, and synthesizes speech output.

nodes.name: Web Scrape
nodes.description: Retrieves and structures data from web pages into usable entities.

nodes.name: Web Search
nodes.description: Queries external search engines or APIs and retrieves relevant result sets.

nodes.name: Wiki Search
nodes.description: Builds, maintains, and queries an interlinked markdown or wiki-style knowledge base so an agent can retrieve durable local context across research sessions.

nodes.name: Worker Agent Dispatch
nodes.description: Maps trigger events to optimal agent combinations for background task execution with performance tracking and continuous feedback.

nodes.name: Workflow Automation
nodes.description: Designs, configures, and runs trigger-based multi-step automation pipelines that connect external services, schedule jobs, and orchestrate tool sequences without continuous human supervision.

nodes.name: Workspace Automation
nodes.description: Orchestrates productivity tasks across email, calendar, drive, and documents through unified office suite integrations, automating scheduling and file management.

nodes.name: Write Report
nodes.description: Produces structured, multi-section written output with headings, citations, and coherent narrative.

nodes.name: Writing Plans
nodes.description: Writes comprehensive implementation plans breaking down multi-step tasks into bite-sized sub-tasks.

nodes.name: X/Twitter Automation
nodes.description: Coordinates platform-specific X/Twitter search, tweet and reply retrieval, user lookup, follower export, monitoring, and approval-gated write workflows for social-media agent tasks.
